content:
I would like to learn more about coccinelle for rus, learn how to use it and give it a go with the rust code I maintain. So far the only docs I found are https://rust-for-linux.com/coccinelle-for-rust#coccinelle-for-rust which is not enough for a newcomer like myself.
Could you please advice where to find more documentation for coccinelle?

I would suggest pinging them, since the page mentions:

If you are interested in using Coccinelle for Rust please feel free to reach out to us at Contact with your questions or feedback.

Cc'ing @Tathagata Roy here too, in case it helps.

Hello,
Thank you for the CC Miguel!

@masber We are still working on the documentation for CfR, but a lot of information about the semantics can already be found at CoccinelleForC . But there are some rust specific features/nuances that are scattered throughout the various developmental logs which we are yet to consolidate. I would love to clarify any questions or help out with anything. If you have a specific use case or question please feel free to drop me a dm or email (tathagata.roy1278@gmail.com) :)

Thank you for the CC Miguel!

You're welcome, thanks for the quick reply :)
